llm.summary: The task is complete in substance. The repository now has Prisma/SQLite persistence for endpoint/tool data, a deterministic db:prepare path, idempotent seed defaults for a protected enabled echo endpoint, repeatability unit coverage, and generated schema documentation matching the implemented Prisma models. The provided required-command summary shows npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify all passing.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare is wired to create data/, apply Prisma migrations, generate Prisma Client, and seed endpoint defaults.
Seed preparation is idempotent via upserts and covered by a unit test that runs db:prepare twice against an isolated SQLite database and verifies singular seed rows.

The Prisma schema represents endpoint names, title/display text, descriptions, enabled state, endpoint parameters, response cases, default responses, delete codes, timestamps, and basic endpoint/case failure config fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the inspected Prisma schema, migration shape, runtime preparation behavior, and seed defaults.
The task maps directly to docs/product-specs/endpoint-tool-management.md and remains scoped to the persistence foundation without endpoint UI, runtime auth, REST, MCP, or reset broadening.
All mandatory gates are reported passing in the deterministic check summary: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.

summary: The task is complete in substance. The provided required-command summary shows npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify all passing.
